title.rendered: Prize Alert! Even More Reasons to Vote in the British Travel Awards 2025

content.rendered:
Just when we thought the British Travel Awards couldn’t get any more exciting… they’ve gone and announced even more incredible prizes for 2025 – and we are here for it! ✈️🌞

This is your friendly reminder that every vote you cast enters you into their epic prize draw, and this year’s list of goodies is looking hotter than a Greek island in August. Whether you’re dreaming of a luxurious escape, a family break, or something a little more adventurous, there’s something for everyone – and you don’t have to spend a penny to be in with a chance of winning. Just cast your vote and cross your fingers!

Here’s a little teaser of what you could win…

💙 A £5,000 Greek island holiday with Ionian & Aegean Island Holidays
🎡 A fun-packed family stay for 8 at Lyons Holiday Parks
🌏 A £750 travel voucher with Distant Journeys
🛳 A luxury Danube river cruise to Vienna and Budapest worth over £4,000
🏖 A £5,000 European villa holiday with Solmar – flights and car hire included
🌊 A £750 Luxury Coastal voucher to use on your dream UK seaside break
🚤 A short-break narrowboat holiday with Black Prince
🛌 A night in an airport hotel and 7 days’ parking courtesy of APH
🎶 A ‘Thru The Decades’ music holiday with free drinks for 2 (yes please!)
⛵️ A £1,000 voucher off a flotilla sailing holiday or RYA training course
🚌 And a £1,000 voucher towards a Back-Roads Touring Co. escape

And the best part? You don’t have to book a holiday or spend a thing. Just vote! 🗳️

We’d love your vote in the Best Foreign Exchange Retailer category – it takes just a few seconds, and every single vote counts. We’re up against some of the big players, so your support really means the world to us.

👉 Click here to vote for Travel FX

The more categories you vote in, the more entries you get in the prize draw – so don’t stop at just one. It’s your chance to show your love for the travel companies you trust and potentially bag a sensational holiday in the process. Win-win!

Thanks for supporting us, and good luck in the prize draw! We’ve got everything crossed for you. 🤞🌴

itemListElement.name: Prize Alert! Even More Reasons to Vote in the British Travel Awards 2025

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
